import json

    '/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/handlers/handlers-jaxrs-response-handler.json',
    '/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/handlers/handlers-global-error-handler.json',

    print('=== ' + f.split('/')[-1] + ' ===')

        print(f's{i}: {s.get(\"title\",\"\")}')
    print()
"
